$comment: Per-route metadata for build.mjs. Only the Home route is final in Phase 1; the other four are scaffolded placeholders to be finalized in Phase 3.

index.title: Meridian Hemp Co — A dedicated broker for wholesale hemp flower
index.description: US-grown CBD hemp flower at wholesale. Every lab report checked against the lab's own records, quotes landed with insured freight, contracts written for the Nov 12, 2026 rule. Wholesale / B2B only.
index.ogTitle: Meridian Hemp Co — A dedicated broker for wholesale hemp flower
index.ogDescription: Growers list their flower. I check every COA against the lab's own records, quote it delivered with insured freight, and handle the paperwork.

how-it-works.title: How it works — Meridian Hemp Co
how-it-works.description: From the grower's barn to your dock: intake and grading, COA verification, a landed quote with insured freight, then contract and delivery.
how-it-works.ogTitle: How it works — Meridian Hemp Co
how-it-works.ogDescription: The four plain steps every Meridian deal follows, and what a broker adds to the deal.

lots.title: Current lots — Meridian Hemp Co
lots.description: Live wholesale CBD hemp flower inventory, shared by request. Strain, grow type, CBD%, total THC%, trim, pounds, and landed price per pound.
lots.ogDescription: Live inventory changes fast, so I share the current lot menu by request.

compliance.title: Compliance, in plain English — Meridian Hemp Co
compliance.description: What hemp legally means, the November 12, 2026 total-THC change, why we broker CBD flower only, and how QR-to-LIMS COA verification works.
compliance.ogTitle: Compliance, in plain English — Meridian Hemp Co
compliance.ogDescription: On November 12, 2026, federal law starts measuring total THC. CBD flower qualifies — which is the only thing we broker.

contact.title: Contact the desk — Meridian Hemp Co
contact.description: One desk for buyers and growers. Tell us your spec — grade, volume, cadence, destination states — and we reply within one business day.
contact.ogTitle: Contact the desk — Meridian Hemp Co
contact.ogDescription: One desk for buyers and growers. We reply within one business day.

request.title: Request material — Meridian Hemp Co
request.description: Spec the wholesale CBD hemp flower you need — grade, volume, price target, destination — and get a verified, COA-backed offer within one business day.
request.ogDescription: Tell the desk your spec. A verified, COA-backed offer comes back within one business day.

growers.title: For growers — Meridian Hemp Co
growers.description: Licensed hemp farms: introduce your lots to the desk. License and COA verified before anything is offered, and your farm identity stays protected.
growers.ogDescription: Introduce your lots. License and COA verified, your farm's name stays off the table.

404.title: Page not found — Meridian Hemp Co
404.description: That page doesn't exist — but the desk is still here.
